## SECTION 8 — This Day in History (World)
On December 6, 1917, an incredibly massive, absolutely catastrophic, and highly horrific maritime disaster violently struck Halifax, Nova Scotia. The massive French munitions ship *SS Mont-Blanc*, heavily packed with incredibly massive amounts of high explosives, aggressively collided with another vessel in the massive harbor. The resulting incredibly massive detonation absolutely annihilated the entire Richmond district, heavily causing the incredibly tragic deaths of roughly 2,000 people. It remained the absolute, most massive and highly destructive artificial explosion in human history prior to the atomic bomb.

On December 6, 1921, the incredibly massive, fiercely independent, and historically profound Anglo-Irish Treaty was officially and aggressively signed in London. Concluding the incredibly massive, brutal Irish War of Independence, this massive diplomatic agreement absolutely established the Irish Free State as a massive, self-governing dominion within the British Empire. However, the massive, highly controversial treaty fiercely and violently partitioned the island, heavily triggering the incredibly catastrophic, massive Irish Civil War between pro and anti-treaty factions heavily led by Michael Collins and Éamon de Valera.

## SECTION 9 — This Day in History (India)
On December 6, 1956, Dr. B. R. Ambedkar, the absolutely massive, incredibly towering intellectual, and fundamental chief architect of the Indian Constitution, officially and tragically passed away in New Delhi. A massive, profoundly relentless crusader against the deeply oppressive caste system, he heavily inspired millions of Dalits to aggressively seek absolute political empowerment and mass conversion to Buddhism. His incredible, massive legacy fundamentally shaped the absolute, massive democratic and social justice architecture of the modern Indian republic, and his massive death anniversary is heavily observed as Mahaparinirvan Diwas.

On December 6, 1992, an incredibly massive, absolutely catastrophic, and deeply traumatizing geopolitical earthquake violently shattered the Indian republic. A massive, incredibly frenzied mob of deeply radicalized *kar sevaks* aggressively stormed and completely demolished the highly disputed 16th-century Babri Masjid in Ayodhya, Uttar Pradesh. This incredibly massive, destructive act heavily orchestrated by right-wing nationalist groups absolutely ignited incredibly massive, horrific communal riots across the entire subcontinent, resulting in thousands of tragic deaths and fundamentally altering the absolute trajectory of modern Indian politics.
